metadata.description: Token/quota-efficiency kit for Claude Code: routes each task to the cheapest sufficient model tier and scope-guards UI agents away from data/logic.

plugins.name: model-routing-kit
plugins.description: Routes each task to the cheapest sufficient model tier (Haiku write-tier for copy, Sonnet for UI polish, Opus for risky data/architecture); scope-guards UI agents away from data/logic via a PreToolUse hook.
